List of software dependencies for the Pebble firmware build environment on macOS.

# Purpose
The file lists software dependencies required for a project. Each line specifies a tool or library that the project needs to build or run. The listed dependencies include `freetype`, `gettext`, `llvm`, `cmake`, `lcov`, `node`, and `emscripten`.
